text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Is there anything else I need to buy?

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay there? Do you know where your
parents are?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... My parents? At home, I think...

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did they send you here to run an errand? Do
you know the way home? Is there anything I can
help you with?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I, um... I'm actually a student at Tracen Academy,
so...

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: What?! Y-you are?! My mistake! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
D-don't be! It's okay... I know my appearance can
be misleading at times...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Do I really look that young?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being mistaken for a young child, Nishino
Flower is in low spirits.
